verses.latin_vulgate: Corrupti sunt, et abominabiles facti sunt in iniquitatibus ;  non est qui faciat bonum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֘מַ֤ר נָבָ֣ל בְּ֭לִבּוֹ אֵ֣ין אֱלֹהִ֑ים הִֽ֝שְׁחִ֗יתוּ וְהִֽתְעִ֥יבוּ עָ֝֗וֶל אֵ֣ין עֹֽשֵׂה־טֽוֹב׃
verses.douay_rheims: They are corrupted, and become abominable in iniquities: there is none that doth good.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin opetus, edelläveisaajalle, Mahelatin päällä. (H53:2) Tyhmät sanovat sydämessänsä: ei Jumalaa olekaan; ei he mitään kelpaa, ja ovat ilkiät menoissansa: ei ole joka hyvää tekee.
verses.king_james: The fool hath said in his heart, There is no God. Corrupt are they, and have done abominable iniquity: there is none that doeth good.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus de cælo prospexit super filios hominum,  ut videat si est intelligens, aut requirens Deum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱֽלֹהִ֗ים מִשָּׁמַיִם֮ הִשְׁקִ֢יף עַֽל־בְּנֵי־אָ֫דָ֥ם לִ֭רְאוֹת הֲיֵ֣שׁ מַשְׂכִּ֑יל דֹּ֝רֵ֗שׁ אֶת־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: God looked down from heaven on the children of men: to see if there were any that did understand, or did seek God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala katsoi taivaasta ihmisten lapsia, nähdäksensä, jos joku ymmärtäis, joku Jumalaa etsis.
verses.king_james: God looked down from heaven upon the children of men, to see if there were any that did understand, that did seek God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes declinaverunt ; simul inutiles facti sunt :  non est qui faciat bonum, non est usque ad unum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֻּלּ֥וֹ סָג֮ יַחְדָּ֢ו נֶ֫אֱלָ֥חוּ אֵ֤ין עֹֽשֵׂה־ט֑וֹב אֵ֝֗ין גַּם־אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: All have gone aside, they are become unprofitable together, there is none that doth good, no not one.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta he ovat kaikki vilpistelleet, ja kaikki ovat kelvottomiksi tulleet: ei ole yksikään, joka hyvää tekee, ei ainoakaan.
verses.king_james: Every one of them is gone back: they are altogether become filthy; there is none that doeth good, no, not one.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nonne scient omnes qui operantur iniquitatem,  qui devorant plebem meam ut cibum panis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲלֹ֥א יָדְעוּ֮ פֹּ֤עֲלֵ֫י אָ֥וֶן אֹכְלֵ֣י עַ֭מִּי אָ֣כְלוּ לֶ֑חֶם אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים לֹ֣א קָרָֽאוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Shall not all the workers of iniquity know, who eat up my people as they eat bread?
verses.finnish_biblia: Eivätkö pahantekiät sitä huomaitse? jotka minun kansaani syövät, niinkuin he söisivät leipää; vaan ei he Jumalaa avuksensa huuda.
verses.king_james: Have the workers of iniquity no knowledge? who eat up my people as they eat bread: they have not called upon God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deum non invocaverunt ;  illic trepidaverunt timore, ubi non erat timor.  Quoniam Deus dissipavit ossa eorum qui hominibus placent :  confusi sunt, quoniam Deus sprevit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֤ם ׀ פָּ֥חֲדוּ פַחַד֮ לֹא־הָ֢יָ֫ה פָ֥חַד כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֗ים פִּ֭זַּר עַצְמ֣וֹת חֹנָ֑ךְ הֱ֝בִשֹׁ֗תָה כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֥ים מְאָסָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have not called upon God: there have they trembled for fear, where there was no fear. For God hath scattered the bones of them that please men: they have been confounded, because God hath despised them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siellä he kovin pelkäsivät, kussa ei mitään peljättävää ollut; sillä Jumala hajoittaa niiden luut, jotka sinua ahdistavat: sinä saatat heitä häpiään, sillä Jumala hylkää heidät.
verses.king_james: There were they in great fear, where no fear was: for God hath scattered the bones of him that encampeth against thee: thou hast put them to shame, because God hath despised them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis dabit ex Sion salutare Israël ?  cum converterit Deus captivitatem plebis suæ,  exsultabit Jacob, et lætabitur Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֥י־יִתֵּ֣ן מִצִּיּוֹן֮ יְשֻׁע֢וֹת יִשְׂרָ֫אֵ֥ל בְּשׁ֣וּב אֱ֭לֹהִים שְׁב֣וּת עַמּ֑וֹ יָגֵ֥ל יַ֝עֲקֹ֗ב יִשְׂמַ֥ח יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Who will give out of Sion the salvation of Israel? when God shall bring back the captivity of his people, Jacob shall rejoice, and Israel shall be glad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Oi, jos apu tulis Zionista Israelille! Kuin Jumala vangitun kansansa päästää, niin Jakob iloitsee ja Israel riemuitsee.
verses.king_james: Oh that the salvation of Israel were come out of Zion! When God bringeth back the captivity of his people, Jacob shall rejoice, and Israel shall be glad.
